title: Freezing cold
description: Add variations to packed ice and blue ice
body:
🧊This Resource Pack adds **variations** to _packed_ and _blue_ ice

![Permafrost](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/45871bcc6a97f3db4ab62701fdec8509b1531350.png)
# 
**Changes:**
- 🎨 rare textures variations to ice
# 
❄️The **permafrost** cataclysm took so many... they say that in these _ice_ floes they are still alive
